zh.Cockermouth, Cumberland, England: 英國波藍德考可爾姆斯
zh.Newington Hythe, Kent, England: 英國肯特聶文頓 海
zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffrey de Lucy於大約1120年出生在法國諾門迪奧內盧瑟時，他的父親Richard de Lucy33歲，母親Rohese de Boulogne32歲。他和Agatha至少有1個兒子。他去世於1179年之前在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國哈普爾維古姆。

zh-hans.Newington Hythe, Kent, England: 英国肯特聶文頓 海
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Geoffrey de Lucy于大约1120年出生在法国諾門迪奧內盧瑟时，他的父亲Richard de Lucy33岁，母亲Rohese de Boulogne32岁。他和Agatha至少有1个儿子。他去世于1179年之前在他的家乡，埋葬在英国哈普爾維古姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Lucey  .
French: habitational name from any of various places called Lucy, originally named with the Latin personal name Lucius + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Lucey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Maeve, Niall.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Luasaigh, an altered form of Mac Cluasaigh, a Cork name meaning ‘son of Cluasach’, a byname originally denoting someone with large or otherwise noticeable ears (from cluas ‘ear’).

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffrey de Lucy was born about 1120, in Lucé, Orne, Normandy, France, his father, Richard de Lucy, was 33 and his mother, Rohese de Boulogne, was 32. He had at least 1 son with Agatha. He died before 1179, in his hometown, and was buried in Winchester, Hampshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffrey de Lucy est né environ 1120, à Lucé, Orne, Normandie, France, son père, Richard de Lucy, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Rohese de Boulogne, avait 32 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Agatha. Il est décédé avant 1179, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Winchester, Hampshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffrey de Lucy um 1120 in Lucé, Orne, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Lucy 33 und seine Mutter Rohese de Boulogne 32. Er hatte mit Agatha mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb vor 1179 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Winchester, Hampshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey de Lucy è nato il circa 1120 nel Lucé, Orne, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Richard de Lucy, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Rohese de Boulogne, aveva 32 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Agatha. Morì prima del 1179, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Winchester, Hampshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Lucyが約1120年にフランスノーマンディオルンルクeで生まれた時，父Richard de Lucyは33歳，母Rohese de Boulogneは32歳であった。彼はAgathaとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1179年以前に故郷で死去し，イギリスハンプシュアイアウィンチェスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Lucy(이)가 대략 1120년 프랑스 노먼디 른 뤼ce에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Lucy(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Rohese de Boulogne(은)는 32세였다. 그는 Agatha(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1179년 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 함프실르 윈체스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey de Lucy nasceu aproximadamente 1120, em Lucé, Orne, Normandie, França, seu pai, Richard de Lucy, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Rohese de Boulogne, tinha 32 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Agatha. Ele faleceu antes 1179, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffrey de Lucy родился около 1120 г. в местности лукe, орн, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Richard de Lucy было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Rohese de Boulogne, 32. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Agatha. Он умер перед 1179 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности винчестир, хампшир, Англия.

sm.Abt 1120–Bef 1179: e tusa o le 1120–a'e le'I oo le 1179

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Geoffrey de Lucy nació aproximadamente 1120, en Lucé, Orne, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Richard de Lucy, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Rohese de Boulogne, tenía 32 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Agatha. Murió antes de 1179, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra.
